name: Red Beans and Rice (Chef Du Jour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice 1/4 cup yellow onions.
2. Slice 1/4 cup green onions.
3. Dice 1/4 cup red onions.
4. Chop 1 cup celery.
5. Seed and dice 1 jalapeno pepper.
6. Add 1 bay leaf, 1 teaspoon white pepper, 1 teaspoon Paul Prudhomme's Pork Magic, 3/4 teaspoon dried oregano, 3/4 teaspoon dried basil, and freshly ground black pepper to the pot.
7. Add 1 tablespoon crushed red pepper and 1 tablespoon roasted garlic.
8. Slice 1 pound Andouille sausage into thin pieces and sauté until soft.
9. Dice 1/4 cup Tasso ham and sauté until soft.
10. Shred 1/4 cup pickled pork from a seafood boil.
11. Add 1 teaspoon file powder to the pot and cook for an additional 2 minutes to thicken.
Yield: 6 servings
